from source import sieve

def test_sieve_returns_primes_up_to_7():
    """sieve(7) should return [2, 3, 5, 7]; buggy code with 'any' includes composites."""
    result = sieve(7)
    expected = [2, 3, 5, 7]
    assert result == expected, f"sieve(7) returned {result}, expected {expected}"
